mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, role, content, content_format, status, seq_no, runtime_message_id, created_by, created_at FROM agent_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY seq_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_message (id, session_id, role, content, content_format, status, seq_no, runtime_message_id, created_by) VALUES (#{id}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{contentFormat}, #{status}, #{seqNo}, #{runtimeMessageId}, #{createdBy})
